achievements.description: Listen to All of Mudtooth's Stories

Only Human

achievements.title: The Web
achievements.description: Obtain an Item From the Nightweaver's Web

achievements.title: Was This Supposed To Happen?
achievements.description: Acquire a World Boss's Alternate Reward

achievements.title: Bad Moon Rising
achievements.description: Craft an Item at the Blood Moon Altar

achievements.title: Carnage in C-Minor
achievements.description: Play a Secret Song on the Water Harp

achievements.title: Maxed Out!
achievements.description: Acquire the Max Number of Trait Points

achievements.title: No One Should Have All That Power
Welcome To Hell-A
achievements.description: Survive a plane crash, get bitten, and create your first Zombie-Free Zone.

achievements.title: Hotel California
achievements.description: Fight through the Halperin Hotel to make contact with the authorities.

achievements.title: Personal Assistant Personally Assisted
achievements.description: Track down Michael and rescue him from the Terror at Monarch Studios.

achievements.title: Git Gutte!
achievements.description: Join forces with Sam B and get your hands on some firepower.

achievements.title: Friends Like These
achievements.description: Encounter a mysterious... benefactor? Well, that's what she'd call herself, anyway.

achievements.title: Dr. Reed, I Presume?
achievements.description: Survive the many perils of Venice Beach and meet Dr. Reed at the Serling Hotel.

achievements.title: But Doctor, I Am Butcho
achievements.description: Slay a killer clown and get your blood sample back to Dr. Reed.

achievements.title: Can't Handle the Truth
achievements.description: Learn the truth about what you are as dark secrets are revealed.

achievements.title: Like Riding a Bike
achievements.description: Find Patton and convince him to fly you out of Hell-A.

achievements.title: A Patton Emerges
achievements.description: Survive the Metro system and get to Hollywood Boulevard.

achievements.title: Make it So
achievements.description: Help Sarah and Sebastian light a beacon of hope.

achievements.title: Our True Nature
achievements.description: Give up your chance to be human again.

achievements.title: Gore Horse
achievements.description: Help an artist to complete their greatest (and grisliest) piece of art.

achievements.title: Internet Famous
achievements.description: Complete Amanda's Clickbait quests. You won't believe what happens next!

achievements.title: Zombologist
achievements.description: Unlock every zombie type in the Zompedia.

achievements.title: On Safari
achievements.description: Complete the first tier of every Zombie Challenge.

achievements.title: Variety is the Spice of Death
achievements.description: Complete the first tier of every Weapon Challenge.

achievements.title: Zombicidal Maniac
achievements.description: Complete the first tier of every Combat Challenge.

achievements.title: Survival Skills
achievements.description: Complete the first tier of every Survivor Challenge.

achievements.title: Smorgasbord
achievements.description: Complete the first tier of every Exploration Challenge.

achievements.title: Sole Survivor
achievements.description: Complete 9 Lost & Found Missing Person Quests.

achievements.title: Humanity Distilled
achievements.description: Equip your first Numen Skill Card.

achievements.title: Down with the Sickness
achievements.description: Reach the highest tier of Autophage infection by equipping Autophage Skills.

achievements.title: This is My Weapon
achievements.description: Fully upgrade a Superior weapon and customize it with a mod or perk in every slot.

achievements.title: Not Even My Final Form
achievements.description: Slay a Mutator before it transforms.

achievements.title: Hazardous Materials
achievements.description: Slay 100 Zombies using Caustic, Fire, or Shock damage.

achievements.title: Donk!
achievements.description: Throw a melee weapon and hit a zombie 35+ meters away.

achievements.title: I Got a Zombie Army and You Can't Harm Me
Escape its Gravity
achievements.description: Use a Hand Flare to escape an enemy Grapple

achievements.title: This is the Moment
achievements.description: Dodge at the last minute to avoid an enemy attack

achievements.title: Not the Last
achievements.description: Pick up the first Manuscript Page

achievements.title: Shining in the Night
achievements.description: Ignite a Hand Flare to keep enemies at bay

achievements.title: Secret Stashes
achievements.description: Discover one Cult Stash and one Lunch Box

achievements.title: The Trail of the Writer
achievements.description: Watch all the Writer's Journey videos

achievements.title: Stop the Monster

achievements.title: Stunning Vistas
achievements.description: Stun an enemy with a Flashbang

achievements.title: Gone for Good
achievements.description: Defeat an enemy with an explosion

achievements.title: All Accounted For
achievements.description: Find all weapons for both characters

achievements.title: In One Go

achievements.title: Hidden by the Trees
achievements.description: Find all Cult Stashes and Lunch Boxes

achievements.title: Coffee-Themed Fun
achievements.description: Shoot Mr. Drippy or any other cardboard cutout in Coffee World

achievements.title: Filling the Shape
achievements.description: Place a Charm in all of the bracelet's slots

achievements.title: Back to Life
achievements.description: Use a Coffee Mug Charm to prevent defeat

achievements.title: Altess Levoire
achievements.description: Retrieved the Hyper Cell from Altess Levoire.

achievements.description: Retrieved the Hyper Cell from Abyss Levoire.

achievements.title: Return to the Colony
achievements.description: Achieved Return to the Colony ending.

achievements.title: Cost of Lost Memories

achievements.description: Collected 200 Data Bank entries (Memorysticks, Documents, or Passcodes).

achievements.description: Enhanced Blood Edge to its max.

achievements.description: Enhanced the Rechargeable Tumbler to its max.

achievements.title: Perfect Beta Energy Enhancement
achievements.description: Enhanced Beta Energy to its max.

achievements.description: Regained your memories of receiving the Arisen's charge.

achievements.title: Across the Border

achievements.title: Closure
achievements.description: Experienced the end of the cycle.

achievements.title: Duo Destinies
achievements.description: Changed your vocation to mystic spearhand.

achievements.title: Arrows and Incantations
achievements.description: Changed your vocation to magick archer.

achievements.title: Jack of All Trades, Master of...All Trades
A House? In This Economy?
achievements.description: Purchased a dwelling of your own.

achievements.title: The Savior
achievements.description: Used a Wakestone to restore the dead to life.

achievements.title: Gigantus, I Hardly Knew Ye
achievements.description: Defeated the gigantus in a short span of time.

achievements.title: Full Marks
achievements.description: Found a solution to every conundrum posed by the goddess of riddles.

achievements.title: The Specialist
achievements.description: Reached the maximum rank in a vocation.

achievements.title: Affinity and Beyond
achievements.description: Raised a person's affinity to the maximum.

achievements.title: The Guardian
achievements.description: Led the people to safety in the unmoored world.

achievements.title: The Hero
achievements.description: Overcame all the trials of the unmoored world.

achievements.title: Harpy Joyride
achievements.description: Summoned a harpy, grabbed hold, and took flight.

achievements.title: The Barbecue-Maister
achievements.description: Grilled every type of meat during the night and day.

achievements.title: Nobles' Night Out
achievements.description: Attended a palace masquerade in formal raiment.

achievements.title: Thought I'd Lost You
achievements.description: Restored the dead to life at a morgue or charnel house.

achievements.title: Reaper's Scorn
achievements.description: Accomplished a miracle for several people all at once.

achievements.title: The Regriffining
achievements.description: Took flight on griffin wing a second time.

achievements.title: Plenty Arisen to Go Round
achievements.description: Witnessed a brawl break out in your dwelling among your admirers.

achievements.title: To the Victor Go the Spoils
achievements.description: Reclaimed your items from the scavenger who stole them from you.

achievements.title: I'm In
achievements.description: Used illicit means to pass through the gate at the border.

achievements.title: The Chronicler
achievements.description: And thus did our journey end...

achievements.title: Punisher
achievements.description: Punish 10 enemies (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.title: You're Not the Boss of Me
achievements.description: Defeat a boss without taking damage.

achievements.title: Made to Be Broken
achievements.description: Defeat 20 enemies while semi-primed (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.title: It's Over 50,000
achievements.description: 'Deal an enemy 50,000 damage while it is staggered (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue and while fully primed as Ifrit).

achievements.title: Sheeeeeeeeeeeeeeeift
achievements.description: Land 15 Shift Strikes or Shift Shots combined (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.title: Packing Heat
achievements.description: Execute and land 2 Heatwave Counters in a single battle (excluding those in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.title: Fatal Attraction
achievements.description: Defeat 5 enemies in the air after using Deadly Embrace (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.title: Never Coming Down
achievements.description: Land Gouge, Wicked Wheel, and Rook's Gambit in midair before landing (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.title: I Am the Thunder
achievements.description: Discharge 50 Blind Justice lightning balls (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.title: Rod to Redemption
achievements.description: Lure an enemy into striking a Lightning Rod 3 times before it dissipates (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.title: Untouchable
achievements.description: Use Titanic Block to fend off 10 enemy attacks (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.title: Beat Rocking Blocks
achievements.description: Land the third punch of a Titanic Counter twice in a single battle (excluding those in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.description: Land 100 total hits with Lv. 2 or higher Megaflare (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.description: Execute a Precision Dodge 3 times while charging a single Megaflare (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.description: Inflict Permafrost on 10 enemies by perfectly dodging attacks with Cold Snap (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.title: Cold-blooded

achievements.title: Every Damn Sinew
achievements.description: Land a Lv. 2 or higher Zantetsuken five times (excluding battles in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.description: Execute 3 Steel Counters in a single battle (excluding those in the Hall of Virtue).

achievements.description: Upgrade consumable potency and inventory slots to their maximum.

achievements.description: Anything can be a weapon, so keep using your environment to your advantage. All is fair in such fights! (Ignored in training mode.)

achievements.title: Lightning Hands
achievements.description: Perform 3 takedowns within 12 seconds. (Ignored in introduction level.)

achievements.title: Be like water my friend

achievements.title: Take damage to save time

achievements.description: Harvest and read all implant bios

achievements.description: Grab twenty-five enemies with the GRP

achievements.description: Kill an enemy via GRP and a melee combo

achievements.description: Print a weapon for the first time

achievements.title: Giving Back
achievements.description: Stab five blind enemies in the back

achievements.title: Mugshot
achievements.description: Take a photo using photo mode

achievements.title: Flesh Wound
achievements.description: Use melee or ranged weapons to take both arms off a living enemy

achievements.title: Chew 'Em Up
achievements.description: Kill ten enemies with environmental hazards

achievements.title: Workplace Hazard

achievements.description: Find the Outer Way boarding craft

achievements.title: In the Pipe, Five by Five
Power Up
achievements.description: Restore power to the old facility

achievements.title: Full Circle
achievements.description: Get thrown back into original cell

achievements.title: Become A Ninja In No Time
Eye Of The TaiGore
achievements.description: Spend A Total Of 1 Hour In Practice

achievements.title: Puppet Master
achievements.description: Komplete A Klassic Tower With 5 Different Characters

achievements.title: Test Your Might
achievements.description: Komplete 5 Unique Test Your Might Encounters

achievements.title: Where's Blanche
achievements.description: Trade For An Item From An Outworld Shop

achievements.title: Take And Deny
achievements.description: Trade For An Item From An Earthrealm Shop

achievements.title: Not So Big Now Are You??
achievements.description: Defeat A Mini Boss In Invasions

achievements.title: Who Da Boss??
achievements.description: Defeat A Major Boss In Invasions

achievements.title: Vanquished
achievements.description: Defeat The Final Boss Of An Invasions Season

achievements.title: High Score, Is That Good?
achievements.description: Obtain A Total Score Of 5,000,000 In Gateway Towers

achievements.title: There Is No Knowledge That Is Not Power
Total Disrespect
achievements.description: Perform A Taunt Without Being Interrupted During An Online Match

achievements.title: Thank You For Being A Fan!!!
Witness Me!!!
achievements.description: Change Your Kombat Kard Player Module

achievements.title: A Quest for Strength Fulfilled
achievements.description: After countless battles and considerable struggle, you've arrived. Is this the end of your quest for strength? The answer...lies within.

achievements.title: Get Your Game Face On!
achievements.description: Where's your face, dingus? Get your butt to the avatar creator and sort yourself out! Crying shame we can't fix that attitude of yours while we're at it.

achievements.title: So This Is the Battle Hub...
achievements.description: Ah, yes. Welcome to the Battle Hub. I do not know what you seek, but please, enjoy yourself. That is the purpose for which it was built, after all.

achievements.title: First Encounters
achievements.description: Start by fighting a match in the Battle Hub. It doesn't matter if you win or lose. What matters is challenging yourself to take that first step.

achievements.title: There's Always Time for Training!
achievements.description: How's 30 matches in the Battle Hub sound? If yer not there yet, just keep at it! If ya wanna get sumo strong, ya can't be shy of the ring!

achievements.title: King of the Ring
achievements.description: Starting to get used to competition? Then set your sights on winning 30 Battle Hub matches. Gotta give yourself a challenge if you want to get anywhere in life.

achievements.title: Jungle-Sized Surprise
achievements.description: Ever hear of Extreme Battles? They're a little different from regular fights—a little more WILD. Try it out, and let your instincts take over!

achievements.title: Extreme Combat Training
achievements.description: If you can't adapt, you won't last five seconds on the battlefield. Fight 20 Extreme Battles. Perfect training to sharpen your judgement.

achievements.title: Over the Top Victory
achievements.description: 20 wins in Extreme Battle. Should be a snap for someone like you, yeah? Stomp this one flat, then aim for even greater heights! Bwahaha!

achievements.title: Becoming the Avatar
achievements.description: In Avatar Battles, you can battle others as an avatar―a self outside of your self. Go there, and experience all that such combat has to offer.

achievements.title: Fixin' for a Fight
achievements.description: Nothing gets my engine revving more than a brawl between avatars, live and in the flesh! Let's see you do 20 Avatar Battles!

achievements.title: The Struggle Over Self
achievements.description: An alternate form of combat, with an alternate path to victory. Get 20 wins in Avatar Battles. But don't obsess over the results. Let experience be your guide.

achievements.title: Gazing at the Peak
achievements.description: If you wanna match the one-and-only Jamie Siu, you'd better be early to the starting line. Give a Tournament a shot!

achievements.title: Steely Determination
achievements.description: The determination to stand in the ring and fight is what turns mind and muscle into tempered steel! Enter five Tournaments, and see for yourself!

achievements.title: Dominating Like a Ninja
achievements.description: Ninja can leap staircases in a single bound, but there's no skipping steps in training. Win ten Tournaments. It won't be easy, but you can do it.

achievements.title: Veteran of Battle
achievements.description: Kung fu is the result of ceaseless training. Do anything enough times, and you'll see results. So will you, once you fight in the Battle Hub 100 times.

achievements.title: Kickin' it Old School
achievements.description: Did you know you can play classic games at the Battle Hub Game Center? It's true! Cassette tapes and cartridges might be old...but they're still hecka rad.

achievements.title: Classic Leaderboard Champ
achievements.description: Ever try the Ranking Challenge at the Game Center? Give it a shot! It's important to always challenge yourself, even when it comes to games.

achievements.title: Entranced by Battle
achievements.description: Having an audience changes everything...and turns a mere fight into thrilling spectacle. Spectate a Battle Hub Match, and bear witness to glory.

achievements.title: Combat Analysis
achievements.description: In combat, you must constantly analyze the situation. Spectate an Extreme Battle, and hone your ability to read and react to the unexpected.

achievements.title: Watching Gets Me PUMPED!
achievements.description: Ah, there's nothing quite like a fight, one-on-one, in the flesh! If you wanna appreciate it too, go spectate an Avatar Battle!

achievements.title: Welcome to the Stable
achievements.description: Sounds like the Battle Hub has clubs you can join. Just like a sumo stable! You should join one! Ooh, I wonder if they have chanko stew...

achievements.title: Let the Praise Become Your Muscle
achievements.description: Hrrah! To fight before a cheering crowd is an honor shared by all wrestlers! Go on—try earning yourself a "Nice" fan of your own!

achievements.title: Gotta Be Popular! Uwo!
achievements.description: Uwo! My dream's to become famous, and make Mama proud! You should become famous too! Try gathering 200 "Nice" fans, for starters!

achievements.title: Spirits of Encouragement
achievements.description: Having outside support is a bit like having a spirit. You can't see them, but they lend you strength all the same. Get 600 "Nice" fans, and you'll feel strong too.

achievements.title: Pleased to Meet You!
achievements.description: I used to ask millions of questions as an agent. There's a lot you can learn from people just by talking to them—try chatting in the Battle Hub.

achievements.title: Coolheaded Analysis
achievements.description: Reviewing replay footage is a great way to learn from past fights. Watch with a calm, subjective eye, and you're bound to make some discoveries.

achievements.title: My Title, My Life
achievements.description: Earned any titles for your efforts yet? Me? Pfft. I don't need a title. I'm Jamie freakin' Siu!

achievements.title: Joining the Pack
achievements.description: A lone wolf is strong, but they're far more fearsome if they have a pack to call their own. So go on—try making some friends!

achievements.title: Fashion Leader
achievements.description: Clothing allows us to express ourselves. Know who else never changes their clothes? Animals. Change your outfit. Please.

achievements.title: Ready to Dance?

achievements.title: Dragon Slayer
achievements.description: Craft the Dragon Scaled Armor Set

achievements.title: How it's Going
achievements.description: Fully repair the Amulet of Yggdrasil

achievements.title: Rebel Leader
achievements.description: Return the Hammer of the Rebellion

achievements.title: Invasive Species
achievements.description: Complete all of the Crater Hunts

achievements.title: Rightful Place
achievements.description: Return all the Lindwyrms to Ratatoskr

achievements.title: Pure of Hart
achievements.description: Return the Stags of the Four Seasons

achievements.title: Surge
achievements.description: Use Symbiote Abilities 25 times during Symbiote Surge

achievements.title: Evolved
achievements.description: Defeat 100 enemies with Evolved Venom abilities

achievements.title: Armed and Dangerous
achievements.description: Defeat 100 enemies with Spider Arm abilities

achievements.title: Fully Loaded
achievements.description: Purchase all of Spider-Man's Suit Tech upgrades

achievements.title: Funky Wireless Protocols
achievements.description: Solve the mystery of the Spider-Bots' origin

achievements.title: Slack Line
achievements.description: Stealth takedown 25 enemies in stealth from the Web Line

achievements.title: Hang Ten
achievements.description: Perform 30 Air Tricks in a row without touching the ground

achievements.title: Overdrive
achievements.description: As Miles, use Reverse Flux to pull 6 or more enemies together simultaneously

achievements.title: Home Run!
achievements.description: Round the bases at the Big Apple Ballers Stadium

achievements.title: Just Let Go
achievements.description: As Miles, find the science trophy Miles and Phin won together

achievements.title: You Know What to Do
achievements.description: As Peter, visit Aunt May's grave

achievements.title: Soar
achievements.description: Using only your Web Wings, glide from the Financial District to Astoria (Wind Tunnels are okay!)

achievements.title: Splat
achievements.description: Attempt and fail a trick before "landing" on the ground

achievements.title: Resourceful
achievements.description: Collect a total of 10,000 Tech Parts

achievements.title: Antidote
achievements.description: Defeat a Symbiote that is under the effect of Anti-Venom status
